message:
test(backend): add 23 unit tests for ftui-backend trait crate (bd-1fyk0)

Add comprehensive test suite for the platform abstraction layer:
- BackendFeatures: default, equality, clone, debug
- BackendClock: monotonic time access
- BackendEventSource: size, features, poll, read, drain
- BackendPresenter: capabilities, log, present, gc
- Backend (unified): clock/events/presenter access, full cycle
- Error type: Display + Debug formatting

Crate previously had zero tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
